candidates.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
candidates.summary: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

candidates.title: The only AI glossary you’ll need this year
candidates.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
